creator: korsani@free.fr
text:
Hi,

Sorry for the delay...

- The second directory exists, as I usually use a subdirectory of the main one, thus :
- mpd has access
- and 0.20.17 (the version now installed on my freebsd) doesn't fix it

I found myself unclear about the procedure, so i rewrite it : 

- run musicpd as usual
- 'service musicpd stop'
- change 'music_directory' parameter in musicpd.conf to something else
- 'service musicpd start'
- 'mpc update'
- and then it crashes
